snippets.title: Numerical derivative (finite difference)
snippets.explanation: Central difference approximates f′(x); for smooth f it matches the analytic 3x² - 2 at x = 2.

snippets.title: Autograd derivative in PyTorch
snippets.code:
import torch

w = torch.tensor(2.0, requires_grad=True)
loss = (w - 3) ** 2
loss.backward()
print(w.grad)  # dL/dw = 2(w-3) = -2
snippets.explanation: `backward()` computes the derivative of the scalar loss with respect to leaf tensors—foundation of automatic differentiation.

snippets.title: Sigmoid derivative check
snippets.code:
import numpy as np

def sigmoid(x):
    return 1 / (1 + np.exp(-x))

x = np.linspace(-5, 5, 11)
s = sigmoid(x)
deriv = s * (1 - s)
print(list(zip(x.round(1), deriv.round(3))))
snippets.explanation: σ′(x) = σ(x)(1-σ(x)) peaks at x=0 where σ=0.5 and derivative 0.25.
